# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: allow_ssh
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/{PROJECT_ID}/global/networks/default
    sourceRange: 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "22"
- name: allow_rdp
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/{PROJECT_ID}/global/networks/default
    sourceRange: 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "3389"
- name: allow_http
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/{PROJECT_ID}/global/networks/default
    sourceRange: 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "80"
- name: allow_https
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/{PROJECT_ID}/global/networks/default
    sourceRange: 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "443"
